====={{aniseries|SM}}=====
Molayne first appeared in a picture in ''[[SM067|Love at First Twirl!]]'', where he was introduced as {{an|Sophocles}}'s cousin and a close friend of {{an|Professor Kukui}} during Sophocles's class presentation.

Molayne made his physical debut in ''[[SM079|Showering the World with Love!]]'', where he showed {{Ash}} and {{ashcl}} around the [[Hokulani Observatory]] and, by Kukui's request, also taught them about the life cycle of {{p|Minior}}.

In ''[[SM092|Turning the Other Mask!]]'', Molayne helped Kukui keep his Masked Royal identity a secret from Ash and {{an|Professor Burnet}} during a handshake event. Molayne came up with a plan that would allow Kukui to be present when Burnet shook the Masked Royal's hand which involved him taking over for Kukui as the Masked Royal. The next day, Molayne met up with Ash and Burnet and sat with them as Kukui wouldn't be present until the last minute. Molayne sat with them whilst Masked Royal and {{TP|Professor Kukui|Incineroar}} put on a demonstration. During the event, Molayne attempted to take Kukui's place as the Masked Royal but was tied up by [[James]] and {{an|Faba}}, who had mistaken Molayne for an impostor. Later, when [[Mad Magmar]] attacked the event to get revenge on the Masked Royal, Kukui was unable to fight back since Faba had his Incineroar and costume at the time. After Molayne managed to free himself, he used his {{p|Magneton}} to turn the lights off, allowing Kukui to get his Masked Royal costume back in time to defeat Mad Magmar.

In ''[[SM145|Dreams of the Sun and Moon!]]'', Sophocles mentioned plans to visit [[Mossdeep City]] and the [[Mossdeep Space Center]] with Molayne for his upcoming vacation. In ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'', Molayne was shown leaving Alola with Sophocles.
